patch.value: Regenerate CHANGELOG to drop the duplicate Unreleased section (pm-changelog #47)

The committed CHANGELOG carried a stale '## Unreleased' section mirroring the released ## 2026.6.13 entry — a known pm-changelog prepend-merge defect (GH #47, fixed in pm-changelog 2026.6.13-1). Regenerated canonically via changelog:full (replace mode) to remove the duplicate. Forward prevention propagates when pm-changelog's next base version (>=2026.6.14) is picked up by the caret range.
Ran changelog:full (replace mode) to drop the duplicate '## Unreleased' that mirrored ## 2026.6.13 (pm-changelog #47 prepend-merge defect).
No duplicate Unreleased section in CHANGELOG
